Book a Free Consultation
Engagement Models

Transparent engagement. No surprises.

We don’t believe in hidden fees or vague scope. Every engagement starts with a discovery conversation, a detailed proposal, and a clear understanding of what you’re investing in and why.

Project Engagement

Ideal for defined-scope initiatives

A fixed-scope engagement with clearly defined deliverables, timelines, and investment. Best for platform builds, migrations, and contained initiatives.

  • Detailed technical scoping document
  • Milestone-based delivery plan
  • Weekly progress reports
  • Senior-led execution throughout
  • Full source code ownership
  • 30-day post-launch support included

Ideal for: New platform builds, legacy migrations, defined product features

Discuss a Project
Most Popular

Strategic Retainer

Long-term partnership with dedicated capacity

A committed monthly engagement for businesses that need ongoing technical support, development capacity, and strategic input as they scale.

  • Dedicated monthly engineering hours
  • Quarterly strategic technology review
  • Priority response and SLA
  • Continuous delivery and improvements
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Access to full service spectrum

Ideal for: Scaling businesses, product companies, ongoing technical leadership needs

Explore a Retainer

Technical Advisory

Strategic guidance without full engagement

Access to senior-level technical expertise for businesses that need strategic input, architecture review, or leadership advisory without a full project engagement.

  • Regular advisory sessions (weekly or biweekly)
  • Architecture and technical decision review
  • Vendor and technology evaluation
  • Team structure and hiring guidance
  • On-call access for critical decisions
  • Written recommendations and roadmaps

Ideal for: CTO-as-a-service needs, pre-build validation, internal team support

Inquire About Advisory

Need a custom engagement?

Multi-year enterprise contracts, multi-team engagements, and complex multi-service programs are available with customized structures. Let’s build the right model for your organization.

Request a Custom Proposal
Common Questions

Frequently asked.

Do you publish prices?

We don't publish fixed pricing because the right engagement structure depends on your specific goals, scale, and timeline. We always begin with a discovery call, and we will give you an honest, itemized proposal before any commitment.

What is the minimum engagement?

Project engagements typically start at a scope that warrants dedicated architecture and planning — usually $30,000+. Advisory engagements are available from a lower minimum. We don't do quick freelance tasks.

How long does a typical project take?

Most platform builds run 3–6 months. Smaller, well-scoped features or integrations may be 4–8 weeks. Advisory engagements are ongoing. We will always give you a realistic timeline in the proposal.

Who owns the code?

You do. Always. 100% of intellectual property, source code, and assets belong to you from the moment they're created.

Do you take on non-enterprise businesses?

We work with ambitious businesses at various stages, not exclusively large corporations. What matters is that you're serious about technology as a long-term investment — not looking for the cheapest option.

Start with a real conversation.

No pressure, no pitch. Just an honest discussion about your goals and whether we're the right fit.
